title: Bug in evaluating (defined) expression with undef bits

features.name: reduction_and_of_undef_localparam_with_bitwise_not
features.description: Code should include a localparam with all bits set to undefined (1'bx) feeding into a reduction AND operator followed by bitwise NOT

features.name: unpacked_array_all_undef_bits
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit value where all bits are undefined (1'bx), used in reduction operations
